title: 付き合う権利をあげる！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, on the way home...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Lucky you! ♪ Rejoice, for I grant you
the honor of socializing with me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
"Whoa"? Excuse you, I believe you should be
saying "thank you for the honor."

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Now, as for the reason I'm here... Your trainee is
still around, is she not?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
In that case, which would you prefer? Partner
running with me or practicing King
Commendation? I shall allow you to choose.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's where you commend me for my brilliant
wonderfulness. You are to continually praise me
for being such a first-rate individual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Getting roped into something as mindless as that
will probably deal quite a blow to our mental
well-being...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Partner running would definitely benefit
<chrname>, but I'm worried she
doesn't have the stamina to run right now.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! Not a bad choice at all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we end up partner running with King
Halo.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Very well. Hehe, here we go! What's my name?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: It's "King"! You're supposed to yell my name!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hey! No back talk allowed! Put your heart into it!
